ŗ¶¶ŗßÄŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶ė¬†ŗ¶õŗßü¬†ŗ¶¶ŗ¶∂ŗ¶ēŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗßüŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗßá¬†ŗ¶Öŗ¶≠ŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗßüŗßáŗ¶į¬†ŗ¶úŗßčŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶á¬†ŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņŗ¶úŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ģŗ¶üŗ¶Ņŗ¶ēŗßá ¬†ŗ¶Źŗ¶ēŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ ¬†ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶∑ŗßćŗ¶†ŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗßá ¬†ŗ¶™ŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶£ŗ¶§ ¬†ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗ¶§ŗßá ¬†ŗ¶™ŗßáŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶õŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ŗßáŗ¶® ¬†ŗ¶Źŗ¶üŗ¶Ņŗ¶Źŗ¶ģ¬†ŗ¶∂ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ģŗ¶łŗßĀŗ¶úŗßćŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗ•§ŗ¶Öŗ¶≠ŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗßáŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į¬†ŗ¶™ŗ¶ĺŗ¶∂ŗ¶ĺŗ¶™ŗ¶ĺŗ¶∂ŗ¶Ņ¬†ŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶õŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ŗßáŗ¶® ŗ¶Źŗ¶ēŗ¶úŗ¶®¬†ŗ¶™ŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶öŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ŗ¶ē, ŗ¶öŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶üŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶į, ŗ¶łŗ¶āŗ¶≤ŗ¶ĺŗ¶™ ŗ¶įŗ¶öŗßüŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶ď ŗ¶óŗ¶≤ŗßćŗ¶™ŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ•§

ŗ¶¨ŗßáŗ¶∂¬†ŗ¶ēŗßüŗßáŗ¶ēŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į¬†ŗ¶õŗßúŗ¶Ņŗßüŗßáŗ¶õŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ŗßč¬†ŗ¶ģŗßÉŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶ĮŗßĀŗ¶į ŗ¶óŗßĀŗ¶úŗ¶¨ŗ•§ ŗ¶Źŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į¬†ŗ¶łŗ¶¨¬†ŗ¶ēŗ¶Ņŗ¶õŗßĀŗ¶į¬†ŗ¶Čŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶ßŗßćŗ¶¨ŗßá¬†ŗ¶öŗ¶≤ŗßá ŗ¶óŗßáŗ¶≤ŗßáŗ¶®¬†ŗ¶óŗßĀŗ¶£ŗßÄ¬†ŗ¶Źŗ¶á ŗ¶Öŗ¶≠ŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗßáŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ•§¬†ŗ¶∂ŗßćŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶łŗ¶ēŗ¶∑ŗßćŗ¶üŗßáŗ¶į¬†ŗ¶łŗ¶ģŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņŗßüŗßá¬†ŗ¶óŗ¶§ ŗ¶¨ŗßĀŗ¶ßŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶ď ŗ¶Įŗßáŗ¶§ŗßá¬†ŗ¶Ļŗßüŗßáŗ¶õŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ŗßč¬†ŗ¶Ļŗ¶ĺŗ¶łŗ¶™ŗ¶ĺŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ŗßáŗ•§¬†ŗ¶ēŗ¶Ņŗ¶õŗßĀŗ¶üŗ¶ĺ¬†ŗ¶łŗßĀŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶•ŗ¶¨ŗßčŗ¶ß¬†ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗßü¬†ŗ¶∂ŗßĀŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į¬†ŗ¶ęŗ¶Ņŗ¶įŗßá ŗ¶Üŗ¶łŗßáŗ¶®¬†ŗ¶łŗßāŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶™ŗßĀŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶į¬†ŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗßüŗ•§¬†ŗ¶§ŗ¶¨ŗßá¬†ŗ¶∂ŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶łŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ŗßá¬†ŗ¶Üŗ¶į¬†ŗ¶ėŗßĀŗ¶ģ¬†ŗ¶≠ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ôŗßćŗ¶óŗ¶≤ŗßčŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺ¬†ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ•§

ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į¬†ŗ¶ģŗßÉŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶ĮŗßĀŗ¶į ŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶•ŗßá ŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶•ŗßá¬†ŗ¶ģŗßĀŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶™ŗßáŗ¶≤ŗßč¬†ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į¬†ŗ¶≠ŗßÄŗ¶∑ŗ¶£ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗßü¬†ŗ¶ģŗßüŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶™ŗ¶ĺŗ¶Ėŗ¶Ņŗ¶üŗ¶ĺŗ•§¬†ŗ¶™ŗßúŗßá¬†ŗ¶įŗ¶áŗ¶≤ŗßáŗ¶ĺ¬†ŗ¶∂ŗßĀŗ¶ßŗßĀ¬†ŗ¶∂ŗßāŗ¶£ŗßćŗ¶Į ŗ¶Ėŗ¶ĺŗ¶Āŗ¶öŗ¶ĺŗ¶üŗ¶ĺŗ•§¬†
ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗßü¬†ŗ¶öŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶∂ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ßŗ¶Ņŗ¶ē ŗ¶öŗ¶≤ŗ¶öŗßćŗ¶öŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶įŗßá ŗ¶Öŗ¶≠ŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗßü¬†ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶į¬†ŗ¶™ŗ¶ĺŗ¶∂ŗ¶ĺŗ¶™ŗ¶ĺŗ¶∂ŗ¶Ņ¬†ŗ¶∂‚Äôŗ¶Ėŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗßáŗ¶ē¬†ŗ¶łŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗßáŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶į¬†ŗ¶öŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶üŗßćŗ¶Į¬†ŗ¶≤ŗ¶Ņŗ¶Ėŗßáŗ¶õŗßáŗ¶®¬†ŗ¶Źŗ¶üŗ¶Ņŗ¶Źŗ¶ģ¬†ŗ¶∂ŗ¶ĺŗ¶łŗ¶łŗßĀŗ¶úŗßćŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗ•§¬†ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į¬†ŗ¶ģŗßÉŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶ĮŗßĀŗ¶į ŗ¶Ėŗ¶¨ŗ¶įŗßá¬†ŗ¶ĖŗßĀŗ¶¨ ŗ¶¨ŗßáŗ¶∂ŗ¶Ņ¬†ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶į¬†ŗ¶¶ŗßáŗ¶Ėŗ¶ĺ¬†ŗ¶ģŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ŗßáŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶Źŗ¶¶ŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗ•§¬†ŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶ĺ¬†ŗ¶Źŗ¶łŗßáŗ¶õŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ŗßáŗ¶®¬†ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶ĺ¬†ŗ¶¨ŗ¶≤ŗ¶õŗßáŗ¶® ŗ¶Ź ŗ¶∂ŗßāŗ¶£ŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺ¬†ŗ¶™ŗßāŗ¶įŗ¶£¬†ŗ¶Ļŗ¶ďŗßüŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶®ŗßüŗ•§

ŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶¶ŗ¶ĺ¬†ŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶ģŗßá¬†ŗ¶ģŗ¶łŗ¶úŗ¶Ņŗ¶¶ŗßá ŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶úŗ¶ĺ¬†ŗ¶∂ŗßáŗ¶∑ŗßá ŗ¶łŗßāŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶™ŗßĀŗ¶į¬†ŗ¶ēŗ¶ģŗ¶Ņŗ¶Čŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ¬†ŗ¶łŗßáŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶üŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗßá ŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶Ėŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶Ļŗßü¬†ŗ¶ģŗ¶įŗ¶¶ŗßáŗ¶Ļŗ•§¬†ŗ¶∂ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶¶ŗßćŗ¶ßŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶§ŗßá ŗ¶Üŗ¶łŗßáŗ¶®¬†ŗ¶§ŗ¶•ŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ģŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶įŗßÄ¬†ŗ¶°. ŗ¶Ļŗ¶ĺŗ¶õŗ¶ĺŗ¶®¬†ŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶Ļŗ¶ģŗßĀŗ¶¶ŗ•§¬† ŗ¶öŗ¶≤ŗ¶öŗßćŗ¶öŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶į¬†ŗ¶∂ŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ŗßćŗ¶™ŗßÄ ŗ¶łŗ¶ģŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶į ŗ¶™ŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶∑¬†ŗ¶•ŗßáŗ¶ēŗßáŗ¶ď¬†ŗ¶Źŗ¶¶ŗ¶Ņŗ¶®¬†ŗ¶ęŗßĀŗ¶≤¬†ŗ¶¶ŗ¶Ņŗßüŗßá¬†ŗ¶∂ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶¶ŗßćŗ¶ßŗ¶ĺ¬†ŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗßč ŗ¶Ļŗßüŗ•§

ŗ¶Öŗ¶≠ŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗßüŗßáŗ¶į¬†ŗ¶¶ŗßÄŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶ė ŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗßüŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗßá¬†ŗßęŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į¬†ŗ¶™ŗßáŗßüŗßáŗ¶õŗßáŗ¶® ŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶§ŗßÄŗßü ŗ¶öŗ¶≤ŗ¶öŗßćŗ¶öŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶į¬†ŗ¶™ŗßĀŗ¶įŗ¶∑ŗßćŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ•§ŗ¶≠ŗßāŗ¶∑ŗ¶Ņŗ¶§¬†ŗ¶Ļŗßüŗßáŗ¶õŗßáŗ¶®¬†ŗ¶Üŗ¶úŗßÄŗ¶¨ŗ¶®¬†ŗ¶łŗ¶ģŗßćŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗßüŗ•§¬†ŗ¶Źŗ¶õŗ¶ĺŗßúŗ¶ĺŗ¶ď¬†ŗß®ŗß¶ŗßßŗßę ŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ŗßá¬†ŗ¶Öŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶úŗ¶®¬†ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶® ŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶∑ŗßćŗ¶üŗßćŗ¶įŗßÄŗßü¬†ŗ¶łŗ¶ģŗßćŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺ¬†ŗ¶Źŗ¶ēŗßĀŗ¶∂ŗßá ŗ¶™ŗ¶¶ŗ¶ēŗ•§

ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į¬†ŗ¶ģŗßÉŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶ĮŗßĀŗ¶į ŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶•ŗßá ŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶•ŗßá¬†ŗ¶ģŗßĀŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶™ŗßáŗ¶≤ŗßč¬†ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į¬†ŗ¶≠ŗßÄŗ¶∑ŗ¶£ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗßü¬†ŗ¶ģŗßüŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶™ŗ¶ĺŗ¶Ėŗ¶Ņŗ¶üŗ¶ĺŗ•§¬†ŗ¶™ŗßúŗßá¬†ŗ¶įŗ¶áŗ¶≤ŗßáŗ¶ĺ¬†ŗ¶∂ŗßĀŗ¶ßŗßĀ¬†ŗ¶∂ŗßāŗ¶£ŗßćŗ¶Į ŗ¶Ėŗ¶ĺŗ¶Āŗ¶öŗ¶ĺŗ¶üŗ¶ĺŗ•§¬†
ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗßü¬†ŗ¶öŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶∂ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ßŗ¶Ņŗ¶ē ŗ¶öŗ¶≤ŗ¶öŗßćŗ¶öŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶įŗßá ŗ¶Öŗ¶≠ŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗßü¬†ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶į¬†ŗ¶™ŗ¶ĺŗ¶∂ŗ¶ĺŗ¶™ŗ¶ĺŗ¶∂ŗ¶Ņ¬†ŗ¶∂‚Äôŗ¶Ėŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗßáŗ¶ē¬†ŗ¶łŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗßáŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶į¬†ŗ¶öŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶üŗßćŗ¶Į¬†ŗ¶≤ŗ¶Ņŗ¶Ėŗßáŗ¶õŗßáŗ¶®¬†ŗ¶Źŗ¶üŗ¶Ņŗ¶Źŗ¶ģ¬†ŗ¶∂ŗ¶ĺŗ¶łŗ¶łŗßĀŗ¶úŗßćŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗ•§¬†ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į¬†ŗ¶ģŗßÉŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶ĮŗßĀŗ¶į ŗ¶Ėŗ¶¨ŗ¶įŗßá¬†ŗ¶ĖŗßĀŗ¶¨ ŗ¶¨ŗßáŗ¶∂ŗ¶Ņ¬†ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶į¬†ŗ¶¶ŗßáŗ¶Ėŗ¶ĺ¬†ŗ¶ģŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ŗßáŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶Źŗ¶¶ŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗ•§¬†ŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶ĺ¬†ŗ¶Źŗ¶łŗßáŗ¶õŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ŗßáŗ¶®¬†ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶ĺ¬†ŗ¶¨ŗ¶≤ŗ¶õŗßáŗ¶® ŗ¶Ź ŗ¶∂ŗßāŗ¶£ŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺ¬†ŗ¶™ŗßāŗ¶įŗ¶£¬†ŗ¶Ļŗ¶ďŗßüŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶®ŗßüŗ•§

ŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶¶ŗ¶ĺ¬†ŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶ģŗßá¬†ŗ¶ģŗ¶łŗ¶úŗ¶Ņŗ¶¶ŗßá ŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶úŗ¶ĺ¬†ŗ¶∂ŗßáŗ¶∑ŗßá ŗ¶łŗßāŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶™ŗßĀŗ¶į¬†ŗ¶ēŗ¶ģŗ¶Ņŗ¶Čŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ¬†ŗ¶łŗßáŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶üŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗßá ŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶Ėŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶Ļŗßü¬†ŗ¶ģŗ¶įŗ¶¶ŗßáŗ¶Ļŗ•§¬†ŗ¶∂ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶¶ŗßćŗ¶ßŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶§ŗßá ŗ¶Üŗ¶łŗßáŗ¶®¬†ŗ¶§ŗ¶•ŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ģŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶įŗßÄ¬†ŗ¶°. ŗ¶Ļŗ¶ĺŗ¶õŗ¶ĺŗ¶®¬†ŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶Ļŗ¶ģŗßĀŗ¶¶ŗ•§¬† ŗ¶öŗ¶≤ŗ¶öŗßćŗ¶öŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶į¬†ŗ¶∂ŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ŗßćŗ¶™ŗßÄ ŗ¶łŗ¶ģŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶į ŗ¶™ŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶∑¬†ŗ¶•ŗßáŗ¶ēŗßáŗ¶ď¬†ŗ¶Źŗ¶¶ŗ¶Ņŗ¶®¬†ŗ¶ęŗßĀŗ¶≤¬†ŗ¶¶ŗ¶Ņŗßüŗßá¬†ŗ¶∂ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶¶ŗßćŗ¶ßŗ¶ĺ¬†ŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗßč ŗ¶Ļŗßüŗ•§

SAINT MARTIN :-
St. Martin's Island is a small island in the northeastern part of the Bay of Bengal, about 9 km south of the tip of the Cox's Bazar-Teknaf peninsula, and forming the southernmost part of Bangladesh. There is a small adjoining island that is separated at high tide, called Chera Dwip.

COX'S BAZAR :-
Cox‚Äôs Bazar is a town on the southeast coast of Bangladesh. It‚Äôs known for its very long, sandy beachfront, stretching from Sea Beach in the north to Kolatoli Beach in the south. Aggameda Khyang monastery is home to bronze statues and centuries-old Buddhist manuscripts. South of town, the tropical rainforest of Himchari National Park has waterfalls and many birds. North, sea turtles breed on nearby Sonadia Island.

snippet.title: Gangubai Kathiawadi | Official Teaser | Sanjay Leela Bhansali, Alia Bhatt | 30th July 2021
snippet.description:
Gangubai Kathiawadi - A story, based on the book ‚Äú Mafia Queens of Mumbai‚ÄĚ written by  S. Hussain Zaidi, is a film that celebrates the rise of a simple girl from Kathiawad who had no choice but to embrace the ways of destiny and swing it in her favour.

The narrative walks through the life of young Ganga who in no time marks her own territory and becomes Gangubai ‚Äď The Matriarch of Kamathipura.

Once again, Sanjay Leela Bhansali brings to his audience a moving yet stem-winding story with power-packed performances laced in his magical musical notes.
With a promise to make one and all feel inspired in 2021 as Gangubai Kathiawadi celebrates the journey of a girl who became the voice for women empowerment.

Bhansali Productions & PEN Studios  Present
A Film by Sanjay Leela Bhansali
Produced by: Sanjay Leela Bhansali & Dr. Jayantilal Gada (Pen Studios)

In Cinemas: July 30, 2021

snippet.title: Mission Valentine | Ashish Chanchlani
snippet.description:
Download the OctaFX Trading App at https://bit.ly/Chanchlani_OctaFX and get 5000 USD in your demo account ūüíĶ. Start making extra money with the "Best Forex Broker in India 2020" - OctaFXūüŹÜūüďą

Aa gaya humara naya video
MISSION VALENTINE!
PURA VIDEO END TAK DEKHNA
Warna maza nai aaega
Bahut time baad tum sab seth logo ke lie ek one story video banayi
Haan maalum hai tum sabko laga 3rd part aaega valentine ka 
Lekin dekha humne kaise usko tease kiya video meinūüėČ
Acha sachi bolta hu is video ke peeche 1 mahina lag gaya,from scripting to editing islie itna delay ho gaya video
Maafi seth log.
But maza aa gaya
Ye descrption main aaj subah ke 6 baje hagte hue likh raha hu socho kitni fatt gayiūüėā
Wo sab chodho ye humara pehla video hai jisme humne first time ek naye aspect ko introduce kiya aur normalize kiya
(Lekin DOKHA paap hai saalo yaad rakhna)
Abhi suno kasam se kehta hu is baar puri ki puri editing maine ki
Is baar video mein puri ki puri ACV team hai
Except Anmol
Except Grishim
Except Muski
Okay lol..
Is video mein kaafi naye chehre bhi dekhne mile honge jinhone bahut amazing performance diya
Introducing ACV team mein Bhavika Motwani as kaam-waali didi
Super talented Vivek Menon (@Watermenon Pictures ) apne beyounick ki team se (teesra hawaldar after kunal & tusharūüėā)
Aur to aur wo hotel waali ladki jo bhaag gayi Ritika bajaj
Baaki sab purane chawal hai ACV team ke likhte likhte thak jaunga
@Akash Dodeja as mc dost
@Kunal Chhabhria  as lavaris baap
@Simran Dhanwani meri valentine 
Manvita Chhabhria (kunal ki real life biwi aur meri reel life mummy)
@Rohit Sadhwani  as harami manager
@Ritesh Sadhwani  wo paneer-dudh waala 
@Tanish Sirwani  wo dank hotel guest
@Jashan Sirwani  wo hotel waala jo mam ke saath aaya tha
Akash jagtap wo acha desh ka nagrik jo buzurko ki madad karta hai (dont judge a book by its cover)
@Paras Rupani  as bhagoda boyfriend
Animesh Makhija wo nanga dodta hua guest (bhai ki body achi thi toh nanga scene kiya apne liyeūüôĆūüŹĽ)
Karan dhanwani rota hua aashiq (dhyaan se dekhna)
Camera @Siddharth Kedare  urf cinderella ne sambhala (shoot khatam hote hi bhaag jaata hai saala)
Lights aur production sirwani brothers ( mere mama ke ladke, aaj kal 50 r lete hai din ka)
Sound handling by ritesh wohi dudh waala
Ladka acha hai but jokes gande maarta hai
Wo hotel couple of wala scene ka idea was idea by Ashi chawla (idea ache deta hai par shooting se darta hai)
Baaki script writing & direction by your chanchu‚Ě§ÔłŹ
Seth log agar ye video pasand aayi toh please
Like chodh ke jaana
Mast comment karna favorite scene aur video apne committed (if they exist) as well as single ( matlab sab logūüėā)
ke saath share karna
Baaki toh tum seth log ko  maalum hai tumhara ashu tum acvians se kitna pyaar karta haiūüėė
#AshishChanchlani #MissionValentine #Acvians

Noakhali TV is a community based channel in Noakhali, Bangladesh. The channel is only based on Noakhali, Feni & Lakshmipur, aiming to improve public awareness.

‚ě§NOAKHALI - ŗ¶®ŗßčŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶ĺŗ¶Ėŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ŗßÄ
Noakhali is a district in South-eastern Bangladesh. It is located in the Chittagong Division. Noakhali district, whose earlier name was Bhulua, was established in 1821. It was named Noakhali in 1868.

‚ě§LAKSHMIPUR or LAXMIPUR DISTRICT - ŗ¶≤ŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶∑ŗßćŗ¶ģŗßÄŗ¶™ŗßĀŗ¶į ŗ¶úŗßáŗ¶≤ŗ¶ĺ
(Lakshmipur Jela also Lakshmipur Zila) with an area of 1455.96 km¬≤, is a district of Bangladesh. It is bordered by Chandpur District to the north, Bhola and Noakhali districts to the south, Noakhali District to the east, and Barisal and Bhola districts to the west.
 It is located in the Chittagong Division. 

‚ě§FENI  DISTRICT - ŗ¶ęŗßáŗ¶®ŗßÄ ŗ¶úŗßáŗ¶≤ŗ¶ĺ
Feni is a district located in the South-Eastern part of Bangladesh Administrative division of Chittagong . As of 2015, the district's estimated population stood at 1,437,371, making it the ninth-most populous district in Chittagong Division. Feni was the part of Greater Noakhali. The administrative hub of the district is in Feni Sadar, in the central section of the district. The original name of the district was Shamshernagar, which served as a sub-district under the district of Noakhali until 15 February 1984.[1] The district consists of six sub-districts: Sonagazi, Fulgazi, Parshuram, Daganbhuiyan, Chhagalnaiya and Feni Sadar.

‚ě§NOAKHALI SCIENCE AND TECHNOLOGY UNIVERSITY : 
Noakhali Science and Technology University is a public university in the coastal terrain Noakhali of Bangladesh. Noakhali TV is a community based channel in Noakhali, Bangladesh. The channel is only based on Noakhali, Feni & Lakshmipur, aiming to improve public awareness.

‚ě§NOAKHALI - ŗ¶®ŗßčŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶ĺŗ¶Ėŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ŗßÄ
Noakhali is a district in South-eastern Bangladesh. It is located in the Chittagong Division. Noakhali district, whose earlier name was Bhulua, was established in 1821. It was named Noakhali in 1868.

‚ě§LAKSHMIPUR or LAXMIPUR DISTRICT - ŗ¶≤ŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶∑ŗßćŗ¶ģŗßÄŗ¶™ŗßĀŗ¶į ŗ¶úŗßáŗ¶≤ŗ¶ĺ
(Lakshmipur Jela also Lakshmipur Zila) with an area of 1455.96 km¬≤, is a district of Bangladesh. It is bordered by Chandpur District to the north, Bhola and Noakhali districts to the south, Noakhali District to the east, and Barisal and Bhola districts to the west.
 It is located in the Chittagong Division. 

‚ě§FENI  DISTRICT - ŗ¶ęŗßáŗ¶®ŗßÄ ŗ¶úŗßáŗ¶≤ŗ¶ĺ
Feni is a district located in the South-Eastern part of Bangladesh Administrative division of Chittagong . As of 2015, the district's estimated population stood at 1,437,371, making it the ninth-most populous district in Chittagong Division. Feni was the part of Greater Noakhali. The administrative hub of the district is in Feni Sadar, in the central section of the district. The original name of the district was Shamshernagar, which served as a sub-district under the district of Noakhali until 15 February 1984.[1] The district consists of six sub-districts: Sonagazi, Fulgazi, Parshuram, Daganbhuiyan, Chhagalnaiya and Feni Sadar.

‚ě§MAIJDEE : 
Maijdee is a town in south eastern Bangladesh, located in Noakhali District, part of the Chittagong Division. Thugarbhanga is the administrative center of Noakhali district and its main town. It is also known as Maijdee court town. It consists of 9 wards and 36 mahallas. It has an area of 12.61 km¬≤.

‚ě§GANDHI ASHRAM : The Gandhi Ashram Trust, also called the Ambika-Kaliganga Charitable Trust, is a philanthropic and development organization working in Noakhali since 1946 with Gandhian philosophy of rural development.

‚ě§NOAKHALI SCIENCE AND TECHNOLOGY UNIVERSITY : 
Noakhali Science and Technology University is a public university in the coastal terrain Noakhali of Bangladesh. It is the 27th public university and fifth science and technology university in Bangladesh. Its foundation stone was laid on 11 October 2003 and academic activities started on 22 June 2006.

snippet.title: Perseverance Rover‚Äôs Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: Hridoy Ekta Ayna 2.0 | ŗ¶ĻŗßÉŗ¶¶ŗßü ŗ¶Źŗ¶ēŗ¶üŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶Üŗßüŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺ ŗß®.ŗß¶ | HD | Imran Mahmudul & Kona | Anupam | New Music Video
snippet.description:
Anupam Music presenting the Full video "Hridoy Ekta Ayna 2.0". The song adopted the punch line of  Dhallywood film hit track "Hridoy Ekta Ayna" from the hit film "Phool Nebo Na Ausru Nebo". This time watch the madness unfolds this valentine & spring of 2021. It‚Äôs time to meet the new look of our sensational duos Imran & Kona on this fabulous track! The song filmed by another talented director Chandan Ray Chowdhury.

snippet.title: Roohi - Official Trailer | Rajkummar Janhvi  Varun | Dinesh Vijan | Mrighdeep Lamba | Hardik Mehta
snippet.description:
From the makers of Stree comes another horror comedy. Iss baar mard ko jyada dard hoga!

Roohi is set in a fictional town of North India. The film revolves around two small-town boys Bhaura and Kattanni who are stuck in a forest with Roohi. But there‚Äôs an insidious spirit following them with feet turned backwards. What will happen next? Watch the trailer to know more.

Roohi releases in cinemas on 11th March 2021. A Jio Studios Worldwide release. 

Featuring: Rajkummar Rao, Janhvi Kapoor, Varun Sharma
Directed by: Hardik Mehta
Produced by: Dinesh Vijan & Mrighdeep Singh Lamba
Music by: Sachin-Jigar

snippet.title: All the Prime Minister‚Äôs Men  | Al Jazeera Investigations
snippet.description:
Click here for the Bangla Language: https://youtu.be/B1BM79J863o
An explosive investigation reveals how a criminal gang is colluding with the security forces of Bangladesh and has links to Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina.

Undercover reporters with the I-Unit expose how a former street mafia claims to have captured a state. The brother of Bangladesh‚Äôs army chief boasts that he can use police and paramilitary units to abduct rivals and earn millions in bribes.

Documents obtained by the I-Unit also show that head of the army has helped a convicted killer evade justice. And how the country‚Äôs military intelligence service has secretly bought spyware from Israel ‚Äď a country that Bangladesh does not recognise ‚Äď that can monitor the prime minister‚Äôs political rivals. 

The I-Unit invited all those involved in this investigation to respond to our findings. They included Bangladesh‚Äôs Prime Minister, Home Minister, Inspector General, Police Commissioner and all four Ahmed Brothers. 

None responded to our inquiries.

After the release of the investigation, Bangladesh‚Äôs Ministry of Foreign Affairs issued a statement describing our findings as a ‚Äúsmear campaign‚ÄĚ that was orchestrated by opponents of the regime based abroad.
It dismissed statements made by the brother of Bangladesh‚Äôs Chief of Army Staff s baseless and said Haris Ahmed had no links to Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina or any other state institution.

snippet.title: CHAKRA KA RAHASYA Released Hindi Dubbed Movie | Naga Shaurya New Hindi Dubbed Movie |Mehreen Pirzada
snippet.description:
Gana (Naga Shaurya) returns to India for his sister Priya's (Sargun Kaur Luthra) marriage but is shocked to see her trying to commit suicide one night, and is shocked to learn she is pregnant but does not know who impregnated her. Gana explains this to her fianc√© Ravi (Prince Cecil) who understands the situation, helps Priya get aborted, and promises to keep this a secret. Gana further convinces Priya to move on and forget about the past, which she does and happily gets married. After her marriage, Gana violently fights and interrogates men who troubled Priya in the past, only to learn none of them are behind her impregnation. Soon, another mysteriously impregnated woman named Sadhana commits suicide, and Gana reads her suicide letter explaining she didn't know how she got pregnant without her knowledge. Gana meets her parents and discovers her hospital reports according to which she fainted 3 months ago and was admitted by someone. Realizing Priya also fainted and was admitted, Gana goes to the hospital and finds out Sadhana was admitted in an emergency by an ambulance. He then learns that more girls named Lakshmi and Monica were also admitted by a similar ambulance.

The next day, Gana's girlfriend Neha (Mehreen Pirzada) informs him about her friend who fainted in the mall and was taken in an ambulance that hasn't arrived at the hospital yet. Gana rushes to the hospital and with help from the technical department, chases after the ambulances equipped with trackers. He stops many ambulances but doesn't find Neha's friend inside. Soon, he reaches a dead end and abandons his bike. Using his parkour skills, he chases after an ambulance, only to find him looking at another one that isn't being tracked. He ambushes the ambulance, fights off the men inside, and rescues Neha's friend. On the other hand, a psychopathic pathologist named Dr. Manoj Kumar (Jisshu Sengupta) is revealed to be the mastermind behind the pregnant girls, who then eliminates the fishermen. Later, Neha questions Gana's recent attitude towards her, forcing him to reveal his mission and what happened to Priya. Soon, a minister's daughter named Sowmya is killed and her corpse is dropped in front of the police station. With Neha's help, Gana manages to access Sowmya's laptop and receives photos where he spots an old man, Manoj's grandfather. Further, Gana manages to access CCTV footage of Sowmya buying a perfume from a vendor who reveals the old man told him to sell the perfumes and paid him for it. Since Sowmya was a drug addict, she wasn't unconscious despite being subject to anesthesia and thus knew about Manoj. Despite his friend's insistence not to do so, Manoj ended up killing her. Back to the present, the cops ask Manoj to perform an autopsy on Sowmya.

Gana then explains to Neha that all the victims, though unrelated, were admitted to hospital because of Hypoglycemia induced artificially by a banned drug called Hypomacene. Gana later visits the mall to view surveillance footage and discovers an address that leads him to Manoj's house. Having seen him talk about the autopsy on TV, Gana asks him for help with the case while Manoj tells him to wait for coffee. Manoj explains to his friend that he'd kill Gana, but receiving a call from Neha about the old man dumping another corpse in front of the police station, Gana secretly runs away. A car chase ensues, resulting in the old man's death after Manoj drops a cargo container on his car. Gana then goes to Manoj's house where he discovers dead bodies in separate vessels before Manoj arrives there with his friend. Manoj's friend, who turns out to be his father, removes his belt and starts beating him. It is then revealed that Manoj was psychopathic as a kid and even killed his father who since then appeared as a hallucination. Back to the present,Gana fights with Manoj and beats his head with a glass bottle. He throws him to a wardrobe and Gana drops a chandelier over him. Manoj is laughing, but when he sees his death weapon coming towards him , he faints. The chandelier falls over Manoj killing him. He then receives a call from his father who pranks him into believing a man is trying to harass Priya. Gana arrives home, and finds out Priya is now happily pregnant with Ravi's child

For More Hindi Dubbed Movies :-
Chanakya Full Movie - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RX4k1BQFS3c&t=110s
Damayanthi Full Movie - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=I_yhiZvEdUY&t=116s
Chalo (Nagashaurya) Full Movie - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=y5CJhgYf-Hc&t=149s
RX 100 Full Movie - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_O_rAmKP-KY

snippet.description:
After getting backstabbed by Jay more than once, Bani decides to not repeat her mistake of giving him another chance. However, as she advances to land a lethal blow upon Jay, he uses deception and freezes her by throwing a potion! Now, with a frozen body that continues to drop below deadly temperature, how will Bani make it to safety?

About Bangladesh Cricket team:

The Bangladesh men's national cricket team (Bengali: ŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶āŗ¶≤ŗ¶ĺŗ¶¶ŗßáŗ¶∂ ŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶§ŗßÄŗ¶Įŗ¶ľ ŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶ēŗßáŗ¶ü ŗ¶¶ŗ¶≤), popularly known as, The Tigers[citation needed] is administered by the Bangladesh Cricket Board (BCB). It is a Full Member of the International Cricket Council (ICC) with Test and One-Day International (ODI) status. It played its first Test match in November 2000 against India in Dhaka, becoming the tenth Test-playing nation.
 Bangladesh's first official foray into international cricket came in the 1979 ICC Trophy in England. On 31 March 1986, Bangladesh played its first ODI match, against Pakistan in the Asia Cup. For a long time, football was the most popular sport in Bangladesh, but cricket gradually became very popular ‚Äď particularly in urban areas ‚Äď and by the late 1990s had surpassed football.
Bangladesh made its full debut in international cricket in the 1986 Asia Cup.In 1997, Bangladesh won the ICC Trophy in Malaysia and thus qualified for its first Cricket World Cup to participate in England in 1999. There, it defeated Pakistan ‚Äď causing much upset ‚Äď and also Scotland. On 26 June 2000, Bangladesh was granted full ICC membership. 

Bangladesh holds the record for most consecutive losses in Tests (21, between 2000 and 2002) and ODIs (23, between 2001 and 2004). After gaining Full Member status with the ICC, Bangladesh had to wait until 2004 for its first ODI win since the 1999 World Cup. The team on the losing side on that occasion was Zimbabwe, who also participated in Bangladesh's maiden Test victory in 2005; by securing a draw in the second match, Bangladesh won their first Test series. In 2009 Bangladesh toured the West Indies for two Tests and by winning both secured their first overseas Test series victory.

As of 20 June 2019, Bangladesh has played 114 Tests, winning thirteen. Its first victory was against team Zimbabwe, and the next two came against the West Indian team. Results have improved predominantly at home with draws earned against New Zealand, Pakistan, India and South Africa and wins against England, Sri Lanka and Australia.[9] They played their 100th Test when they toured Sri Lanka in March 2017.[10]

About Bangladesh Cricket team:

The Bangladesh men's national cricket team (Bengali: ŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶āŗ¶≤ŗ¶ĺŗ¶¶ŗßáŗ¶∂ ŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶§ŗßÄŗ¶Įŗ¶ľ ŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶ēŗßáŗ¶ü ŗ¶¶ŗ¶≤), popularly known as, The Tigers[citation needed] is administered by the Bangladesh Cricket Board (BCB). It is a Full Member of the International Cricket Council (ICC) with Test and One-Day International (ODI) status. It played its first Test match in November 2000 against India in Dhaka, becoming the tenth Test-playing nation.
 Bangladesh's first official foray into international cricket came in the 1979 ICC Trophy in England. On 31 March 1986, Bangladesh played its first ODI match, against Pakistan in the Asia Cup. For a long time, football was the most popular sport in Bangladesh, but cricket gradually became very popular ‚Äď particularly in urban areas ‚Äď and by the late 1990s had surpassed football.
Bangladesh made its full debut in international cricket in the 1986 Asia Cup.In 1997, Bangladesh won the ICC Trophy in Malaysia and thus qualified for its first Cricket World Cup to participate in England in 1999. There, it defeated Pakistan ‚Äď causing much upset ‚Äď and also Scotland. On 26 June 2000, Bangladesh was granted full ICC membership. 

Bangladesh holds the record for most consecutive losses in Tests (21, between 2000 and 2002) and ODIs (23, between 2001 and 2004). After gaining Full Member status with the ICC, Bangladesh had to wait until 2004 for its first ODI win since the 1999 World Cup. The team on the losing side on that occasion was Zimbabwe, who also participated in Bangladesh's maiden Test victory in 2005; by securing a draw in the second match, Bangladesh won their first Test series. In 2009 Bangladesh toured the West Indies for two Tests and by winning both secured their first overseas Test series victory.

As of 20 June 2019, Bangladesh has played 114 Tests, winning thirteen. Its first victory was against team Zimbabwe, and the next two came against the West Indian team. Results have improved predominantly at home with draws earned against New Zealand, Pakistan, India and South Africa and wins against England, Sri Lanka and Australia.[9] They played their 100th Test when they toured Sri Lanka in March 2017.[10]

snippet.title: Barcelona vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Extended Highlights presented by Heineken 

Mbappe and PSG power past Messi and Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. Mbappe had one of his best performances of his career notching a hat trick. He opened his day with a goal in the 32‚Äô to tie at one and added two more in the 65‚Äô and 85‚Äô. Moise Kean found the back of the net in the 70‚Äô to help solidify the win.  Messi opened the scoring in the 27‚Äô by way of the penalty spot but that would be all the Spanish side could muster. 

Next up will be the second leg back in Paris, France and Barcelona has an uphill battle in front of them.

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure Superman‚Äôs (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

About Bongo: 
Bongo is  the first and biggest streaming video-on-demand service in Bangladesh. Bongo boasts an ever growing library of over 15.000 full movies, dramas, TV shows, music videos and songs. This unique collection of Bangladeshi content is available through our website, mobile app and other syndicated video delivery media. Bongo has already been recognized with a top start-up in Bangladesh award and has received acclaim from Silicon Valley and European based investment.

Bongo is the first online video service in Bangladesh to be actively involved in creating original content. Our aim is to publish a new episode of original creative content every day, for our wide audience.

Apart from Bongo Originals, our library contains aggregated contents from some of the biggest Labels and TV Channels in Bangladesh. All their content will be available on Bongo including all new releases.

Bongo is the perfect platform for young and upcoming talent to publish their songs, movies or sketches. Always looking for creative and quality content, Bongo offers a win-win situation for content creators and publishers alike. Please contact us for more info on publishing your work on Bongo.

snippet.title: Disney's Cruella | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Brilliant. Bad. A little bit mad. May 2021.

Academy Award¬ģ winner Emma Stone (‚ÄúLa La Land‚ÄĚ) stars in Disney‚Äôs ‚ÄúCruella,‚ÄĚ an all-new live-action feature film about the rebellious early days of one of cinemas most notorious ‚Äď and notoriously fashionable ‚Äď villains, the legendary Cruella de Vil. ‚ÄúCruella,‚ÄĚ which is set in 1970s London amidst the punk rock revolution, follows a young grifter named Estella, a clever and creative girl determined to make a name for herself with her designs. She befriends a pair of young thieves who appreciate her appetite for mischief, and together they are able to build a life for themselves on the London streets. One day, Estella‚Äôs flair for fashion catches the eye of the Baroness von Hellman, a fashion legend who is devastatingly chic and terrifyingly haute, played by two-time Oscar¬ģ winner Emma Thompson (‚ÄúHowards End,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúSense & Sensibility‚ÄĚ). But their relationship sets in motion a course of events and revelations that will cause Estella to embrace her wicked side and become the raucous, fashionable and revenge-bent Cruella.
¬†
Disney‚Äôs ‚ÄúCruella‚ÄĚ is directed by Craig Gillespie (‚ÄúI Tonya‚ÄĚ) from a screenplay by Dana Fox and Tony McNamara, story by Aline Brosh McKenna and Kelly Marcel & Steve Zissis. It was produced by Andrew Gunn (‚ÄúFreaky Friday‚ÄĚ), Marc Platt (‚ÄúMary Poppins Returns‚ÄĚ) and Kristin Burr (‚ÄúChristopher Robin‚ÄĚ), with Emma Stone, Michelle Wright, Jared LeBoff and Glenn Close serving as executive producers. Two-time Oscar¬ģ- winning costume designer Jenny Beavan (‚ÄúMad Max: Fury Road,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúA Room with a View‚ÄĚ) creates the dazzling and imaginative costumes, which take on a life of their own.

For more information on ‚ÄúCruella,‚ÄĚ follow us on:

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/DisneyCruellaDeVil
Twitter:¬†https://twitter.com/cruella
Instagram:¬†https://www.instagram.com/disneycruella
YouTube:https://youtube.com/disneymovietrailers‚Äč
Hashtag: #Cruella

snippet.title: 3D PEN VS GLUE GUN! 17 Cool Hacks And Crafts For You
snippet.description:
We‚Äôve tried every 3D pen and hot glue craft we could imagine, and here‚Äôs what we created. Aren‚Äôt 3D pens just amazing? You can create anything you can think of, make it colorful and give it purpose. Today, we wanted to experiment with something new, and we wanted to show you some amazing hacks you can create at home. But first, let‚Äôs try some experiments with hot glue. Why buy a bath mat when you can make a colorful one with glitter using hot glue? To make it look store-bought, use a printed pattern and some greaseproof paper on top. Sometimes charging your phone becomes a nuisance, so today, we show you how to create a stand for your phone using a 3D pen. But for those of you who want to get craftier, we show you how to make a beautiful romantic ring from scratch using a 3D pen. Watch until the end to discover some fantastic tricks and crafts you‚Äôll adore. 

Timestamps: 

1:06 ‚ÄĒ How to fix a broken wood piece 

2:25 ‚ÄĒ DIY ring 

2:48 ‚ÄĒ Beautiful, DIY jewelry holder

Painting is everyone‚Äôs favorite activity, but it can be very messy ‚ÄĒ and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little one‚Äôs outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. snippet.title: Kaabil Full Hindi Movie | Hritik Roshan & Yami Gautam New Bollywood HD Movies 2021 | New Hindi Films
snippet.description:
Kaabil (transl.‚ÄČCapable) is a 2017 Indian Hindi-language action thriller film[7][8] directed by Sanjay Gupta, written by Vijay Kumar Mishra, produced by Rakesh Roshan under his banner FilmKraft Productions.[9] It stars Hrithik Roshan, Yami Gautam, Ronit Roy and Rohit Roy. The music was composed by Rajesh Roshan. Principal photography of the film began on 30 March 2016.[10]

The film follows a blind voiceover artist who becomes disillusioned when his wife is raped and the perpetrators walk free. He becomes a vigilante and decides to seek revenge against those responsible for his wife's death, while also dodging police with a cover that no one would believe a blind man can kill someone.

Kaabil was released theatrically on 25 January 2017.[11][12] Roshan received the Nomination of Filmfare Award for Best Actor for his performance at the 63rd Filmfare Awards. In 2019, it was also released in China where it became commercially unsuccessful.[13]
